skills.name: Fast Track
skills.description: Triggers Fast Track on the attacker after being attacked by an attack that targets all. Removes 1 debuff from self when using this Skill. Increases self Action Gauge by 15% and grants self 1 stack of Leap after attacking. Reduces the cooldown of Fast Track by 1 turn on Critical Hit.

levels.description: Triggers Fast Track on the attacker after being attacked by an attack that targets all. Removes 1 debuff from self when using this Skill. Increases self Action Gauge by 15% and grants self 1 stack of Leap after attacking. Reduces the cooldown of Fast Track by 1 turn on Critical Hit.

skills.name: On-Site Emergency Judgment
skills.description: Based on a field assessment, skips procedure and immediately takes decisive force to attack the enemy. Grants self ATK Up for 2 turns and increases self Action Gauge by 15%. Removes all Leap stacks and additionally increases self Action Gauge by 20% if Leap is at max stacks.

skills.name: Veteran's Instinct
skills.description: Increases Roberta's CRIT Rate by 50% on attack. Deals 6% increased damage if self HP is 50% or above, and deals 12% increased damage if self HP is below 50%.
